errors.general: Something went wrong, please try again later.

registration.general: Registration failed with an error, please try again.
registration.registrationFailed: Unable to create account. Try logging in or resetting your password
registration.tooManyRequests: Too many registration attempts have been detected. Registration is temporarily blocked for security reasons. Please try again in a few minutes.

login.general: Login failed with an error, please try again.
login.loginRestricted: Too many login attempts have been detected. Login is temporarily blocked for security reasons. Please try again in a few minutes.
login.accessDenied: Access has been denied to you.
login.tooManyRequests: Too many login attempts have been detected. Login is temporarily blocked for security reasons. Please try again in a few minutes.

passwordReset.general: Password reset failed with an error, please try again.
passwordReset.tooManyRequests: Too many password reset attempts have been detected. Password reset is temporarily blocked for security reasons. Please try again in a few minutes.

verifyEmailRequest.general: Sending the verification link failed with an error, please try again.
verifyEmailRequest.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts have been detected. Please try again in a few minutes.

verifyEmail.general: Email verification failed with an error, please try again.
verifyEmail.invalidToken: The verification link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
verifyEmail.tokenNotFound: The verification link was not found. Please request a new one.
verifyEmail.tokenExpired: The verification link has expired. Please request a new one.
verifyEmail.tooManyRequests: Too many verification attempts have been detected. Please try again in a few minutes.

footer.description: A modern tool for tracking electricity and gas consumption. Save money and the planet with smart monitoring.
